case_title: SHARON TROTTER VS. SAN FRANCISCO CLEAN CITY COALITION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TROTTER, SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CLEAN CITY COALITION $83.22 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $83.22, DEFENDANT MAY DEDUCT PERSONAL INCOME TAXES FROM THE JUDGMENT AND IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT TOWARD THE JUDGMENT OF ANY AMOUNTS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,579.82 FILED BY TROTTER, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CLEAN CITY COALITION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFNEDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CLEAN CITY COALITION
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT DATED JUNE 24, 2011 SENT TO SAN FRANCISCO CLEAN CITY COALITION.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE ; SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL DUE TO BAD ADDRESS (FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROTTER, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CLEAN CITY COALITION
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-24-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) SERVED MAY-05-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CLEAN CITY COALITION

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROTTER, SHARON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO RESET A NEW HEARING DATE WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.
